response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with open-source AI/geo-platforms, and deep technical versatility across languages and systems, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product leadership, cloud platform strategy experience, or advanced degrees in AI — key requirements for a director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: Demonstrated entrepreneurial spirit with open-source AI/geo-platforms used by NGOs
Strong full-stack and systems engineering across cloud, AI-agent tooling, and high-performance infra
Active knowledge sharing through workshops and public contributions in testing and web internals
concerns: No clear evidence of building or leading AI-powered cloud products or platforms
Lacks advanced degree in AI or related field; education is BS in CS only
Limited visibility into cloud architecture strategy or customer advisory experience in AI
